response.overview: On the eve of her wedding weekend, Sophia Ryder crosses paths with an ex in a bar of a Parisian hotel. What begins as a chance reunion with Charlie, her once-great love, unravels into a night of emotional reckoning.  As the hours pass and the hotel becomes their backdrop, Sophia is pulled between the version of herself she’s become and the one she left behind. The connection with Charlie is still there—familiar, complicated, and unresolved—but so is the reality of the path she’s chosen.  By morning, Sophia has to face a quiet truth: that moving forward sometimes means letting go of both the past and the future she thought she wanted.
response.title: For the Night.
